title: Reports

headings.text: The IPCC prepares comprehensive Assessment Reports about knowledge on climate change, its causes, potential impacts and response options. The IPCC also produces Special Reports, which are an assessment on a specific issue and Methodology Reports, which provide practical guidelines for the preparation of greenhouse gas inventories.

paragraphs: There are many ways to engage with the IPCC
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) is active socially – choose your network:
There are many ways to be involved and participate in the IPCC world.
